description: Record the new `/coding` follow-up scope after the previous harness cleanup removed PLAN/PROGRESS state.
steps: Create a fresh `PLAN.json` for the `/coding` postflight + status-sync task.
Create a fresh `PROGRESS.md` entry that records the user-approved scope and the existing unrelated `tests/test_coding_mode.py` import failure.
Commit the harness scaffold before code changes.

description: Reproduce the Telegram `/coding list` completed vs `/coding status` running mismatch from current code paths.
steps: Inspect the Telegram router status and list handlers.
Inspect CLI status/list helpers for the same stale-task pattern.
Capture the precise stale-read path that allows list and status to disagree.

description: Map the current coding-task completion lifecycle to find where postflight testing/merge/push must hook in.
steps: Inspect worker launch/cleanup flow.
Inspect progress monitor completion and missing-session triage flow.
Inspect reporting/recovery/runtime watcher flow for terminal-state transitions.

description: Make `/coding status` refresh active task state before formatting the response.
steps: Use `refresh_task()` instead of read-only reporting when the selected task is active.
Reload the task from store after refresh before choosing completion/failed/waiting/running rendering.
Keep completed/failed history status rendering stable for terminal tasks.

description: Make CLI `coding-task status` use the same refreshed state as Telegram status.
steps: Refresh active tasks before printing status details.
Reload the persisted task after refresh.
Preserve the existing read-only metadata test semantics for non-active tasks.

description: Align `/coding list` and `/coding status` around one canonical active-task refresh path.
steps: Extract a helper that refreshes one active task consistently.
Reuse it in list/status code paths.
Avoid duplicate refreshes for terminal tasks.

description: Introduce explicit coding-task postflight state metadata.
steps: Add metadata keys for postflight stage/result.
Track whether postflight has started, passed, or failed.
Store the last postflight command/result summary for reporting.

description: Introduce a stable failure reason for postflight failures.
steps: Add a postflight failure constant to coding-task types.
Teach failure classification/reporting to recognize it.
Expose a user-facing Chinese label and recovery suggestion.

description: Introduce a stable waiting reason kind or progress summary for in-flight postflight work.
steps: Decide whether postflight remains `running` or uses an explicit waiting summary.
Persist a clear summary while tests/merge/push execute.
Ensure notifier/reporting surfaces make sense during postflight.

description: Detect the repository validation command to run after coding work completes.
steps: Prefer `init.sh` when present for harness-managed repositories.
Fallback to package-manager test commands for Node repos when no init exists.
Fallback to `.venv/bin/pytest` / `pytest` for Python repos when no init exists.

description: Detect the package manager or command wrapper for Node repos safely.
steps: Read `packageManager` from `package.json` when present.
Prefer `corepack pnpm` for pnpm repos.
Fallback to `npm test` only when the repo is not pnpm-managed.

description: Avoid blocking forever on obviously unsuitable test commands.
steps: Only use declared `test` scripts instead of guessing watch-mode commands.
Prefer repo `init.sh` over ad hoc command composition.
Return a structured failure when no safe validation command can be inferred.

description: Detect the target integration branch for coding-task postflight.
steps: Default to `main`.
Allow an explicit target branch metadata override later if present.
Fail clearly when the target branch does not exist locally.

description: Validate the integration worktree is in a mergeable state before postflight merge.
steps: Inspect main repo worktree cleanliness.
Reject merge when the main worktree has local changes.
Return a structured postflight failure instead of forcing merge.

description: Fast-forward or merge the task worktree branch into the target branch after tests pass.
steps: Run merge from the source repository root.
Prefer a non-interactive merge mode.
Capture stdout/stderr for reporting.

description: Push the integrated target branch to the remote after merge passes.
steps: Default remote to `origin`.
Run a non-interactive `git push origin <target-branch>`.
Capture push output for reporting.

description: Handle merge conflicts and push failures as structured task failures.
steps: Return a postflight failure summary with the failing step name.
Preserve the task worktree for inspection when postflight fails.
Do not mark the task completed when merge or push fails.

description: Add a dedicated postflight runner that executes tests, merge, and push in order.
steps: Create a helper/module for the postflight sequence.
Return structured success/failure payloads.
Keep command execution local and synchronous for deterministic state transitions.

description: Update task progress while postflight is executing.
steps: Mark progress before tests begin.
Mark progress before merge begins.
Mark progress before push begins.

description: Persist postflight command artifacts into run events for auditability.
steps: Append a run event when postflight starts.
Append a run event for each step result.
Append a terminal postflight result event.

description: Route harness-complete missing-session tasks through postflight instead of immediate completion.
steps: Intercept the `plan_progress.is_complete` path in missing-session triage.
Run postflight before `mark_completed`.
Only call `mark_completed` when postflight succeeds.

description: Route strong-completion-evidence tasks through postflight instead of premature waiting/completion when appropriate.
steps: Decide whether strong evidence should start postflight automatically.
Avoid skipping required tests/merge/push for worker-exit review cases that are truly complete.
Preserve waiting-user behavior for genuinely incomplete or ambiguous exits.

description: Keep tasks active when postflight starts so list/status reflect in-progress validation.
steps: Do not mark tasks completed before push succeeds.
Expose a clear progress summary during postflight.
Ensure recoverable-task logic remains coherent.

description: Avoid rerunning postflight repeatedly across watcher ticks.
steps: Store a postflight-started marker.
Skip duplicate starts when a result already exists.
Allow explicit resume/retry after postflight failure.

description: Preserve worktree/branch cleanup semantics after successful postflight completion.
steps: Keep branch retention rules for successful completion.
Remove only the worktree on success.
Ensure artifacts still clean up after completion.

description: Preserve failed-task cleanup semantics after postflight failure.
steps: Do not destroy forensic context that the user may need.
Keep or remove branches according to the failure policy you choose.
Record cleanup results in audit events.

description: Make user-triggered cancel/stop bypass postflight and remain terminal cleanup actions.
steps: Keep cancel/stop as direct terminal actions.
Do not accidentally run tests/merge/push for cancelled tasks.
Preserve `user_cancelled` summaries.

description: Expose postflight progress in Telegram and CLI status output.
steps: Show current postflight step in status output.
Show latest postflight result detail when available.
Keep completed/failed/waiting messaging concise.

description: Expose postflight failure reasons with specific remediation hints.
steps: Differentiate test failure vs merge failure vs push failure in summaries.
Reference the target branch and remote when relevant.
Suggest concrete next actions (`继续`, fix main worktree, resolve merge, etc.).

description: Expose postflight success evidence in completion reports.
steps: Mention that tests passed.
Mention that merge to `main` succeeded.
Mention that push to `origin` succeeded.

description: Update Telegram `/coding status` handling to use refreshed current task data.
steps: Refresh the selected active task before choosing report content.
Reload the current task from store.
Keep indexed status queries working.

description: Update Telegram `/coding list` handling to reflect postflight-in-progress tasks clearly.
steps: Show a distinct badge or summary while postflight runs.
Keep completed tasks hidden by default until they truly complete.
Keep `list all` history behavior intact.

description: Update CLI `coding-task list` output to reflect postflight state cleanly.
steps: Keep current compact format.
Expose postflight progress via the progress summary.
Keep `--all` history behavior stable.

description: Update CLI `coding-task status` output to show postflight results and refreshed status.
steps: Refresh active tasks before printing.
Print the current branch from refreshed state.
Print postflight detail in a readable form.

description: Wire the postflight runner into the coding-task runtime assembly.
steps: Instantiate the postflight helper from runtime builder.
Provide access to it from the monitor or manager.
Keep existing runtime tests passing.

description: Keep gateway watcher semantics stable after postflight integration.
steps: Ensure the 5-second watcher loop can trigger postflight without duplicate execution.
Ensure notifier still only emits terminal/waiting messages.
Ensure active task recovery on gateway restart remains coherent.

description: Add Telegram router regression coverage for list/status disagreement.
steps: Create a test where a task becomes completed during refresh.
Assert `/coding list` and `/coding status` both show completed afterward.
Cover indexed status if needed.

description: Add Telegram router coverage for postflight-visible running state.
steps: Assert active tasks remain visible while postflight is running.
Assert progress text reflects postflight work.
Assert completed is only shown after postflight success.

description: Add CLI status regression coverage for refreshed active state.
steps: Reproduce the stale status path in CLI tests.
Assert refreshed status is printed.
Keep read-only metadata test semantics for non-active tasks.

description: Add CLI list coverage for postflight and completed state transitions.
steps: Assert tasks remain non-terminal during postflight.
Assert `--all` shows terminal results after success/failure.
Assert compact progress text includes postflight detail.

description: Add unit coverage for postflight test-command detection.
steps: Cover init.sh preference.
Cover pnpm test fallback.
Cover pytest fallback and no-command failure.

description: Add unit coverage for postflight merge/push success path.
steps: Mock successful test/merge/push commands.
Assert completion happens only after all three pass.
Assert progress and audit events are recorded.

description: Add unit coverage for postflight test failure path.
steps: Mock a failing validation command.
Assert task becomes failed and not completed.
Assert merge/push are skipped.

description: Add unit coverage for postflight merge failure path.
steps: Mock successful tests and failing merge.
Assert task becomes failed.
Assert push is skipped.

description: Add unit coverage for postflight push failure path.
steps: Mock successful tests and merge with failing push.
Assert task becomes failed.
Assert completion is not emitted.

description: Add progress-monitor coverage for postflight-triggered completion on missing session.
steps: Create a finished harness repo with missing session.
Mock successful postflight.
Assert the task transitions to completed with postflight evidence.

description: Add progress-monitor coverage for postflight-triggered failure on missing session.
steps: Create a finished harness repo with missing session.
Mock failing postflight.
Assert the task transitions to failed.
Assert it no longer appears completed in status/list.

description: Add reporting coverage for postflight success/failure summaries.
steps: Assert test/merge/push success evidence appears in completion report.
Assert postflight failure label/cause appears in failure report.
Assert target branch/remote hints render correctly.

description: Add runtime assembly coverage for the new postflight collaborator.
steps: Assert the runtime builder wires the postflight runner.
Assert manager/monitor can access it.
Keep existing runtime defaults intact.

description: Extend coding-task E2E coverage to include postflight completion before terminal status.
steps: Use a disposable repo with deterministic test command.
Assert postflight runs before completion.
Assert terminal cleanup still happens after success.

description: Run focused pytest suites for the new `/coding` behaviors.
steps: Run coding-task unit/regression suites.
Run agent/Telegram routing tests that cover `/coding`.
Record results in `PROGRESS.md`.

description: Run a real local smoke and restart the Telegram gateway after the fix.
steps: Use a real repository to exercise the new postflight gate or at least the refreshed status flow.
Restart the Telegram gateway in place so the bot uses the new code.
Report any remaining blockers explicitly if remote push cannot be safely exercised on a dirty target repo.
